_comment: Maximum line counts per file type. Agent: split files approaching these limits.

rules.reason: Test files over 300 lines usually test too many things. Split by concern.
Spec files over 300 lines usually test too many things. Split by concern.
Documentation files are allowed to be longer for completeness.
Harness scripts should be focused and composable.
Harness TypeScript runtime files may be larger but should stay modular.
Large JSON config files should be split into smaller focused files.

violation_message: File {file} has {lines} lines (limit: {limit}). Split it into focused modules. Reason: {reason}
